name: Cream of Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the bouillon cube in boiling water.
2. Cook the chopped onion in butter until tender.
3. Blend in the flour and celery salt.
4. Gradually add seasonings, then milk to the mixture.
5. Cook until thick, stirring constantly.
6. Add crabmeat and cook briefly.
7. Garnish with parsley before serving.
